question:
Will Olympique Lyonnais win on 2025-11-27?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 27, 2025
If Olympique Lyonnais wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.uefa.com/

evidences.title: UWCL final tactical preview: Can OL Lyonnes stop Barcelona? - ESPN
evidences.content: The French club's aerial dominance could even be a match-winning factor as it highlights a key battle in the decisive thirds of the pitch. In 2025-26, Lyon are in the top three for aerial win rate in the attacking third (61.1%), while Barcelona are in the bottom three for aerial win rate in defensive third (42.7%). While she may be 35 years old, as long as Renard is on the pitch then OL Lyonness have a legitimate plan B from dead-ball situations, and Barcelona will have to be wary of them. ### Adapt to Barcelona's left-wing decision Romeu's best XI almost picks itself, except for one spot. The left-wing position is a reactive switch which changes how Barcelona manipulate an opposition backline based on who is playing in that role. [...] OL Lyonnes often go for an aggressive 4-2-4 formation out of possession, committing a lot of players high up the field to leave a gulf in the middle. But rather than exposing his midfield by doing that, Giraldez should restructure his approach to make the most of what has worked against Barcelona before. ### Exploit space behind the full backs Barcelona and OL Lyonnes rank No. 1 and No. 2 for average possession in the UWCL this season; they both...

evidences.title: Olympique Lyonnais - Wikipedia
evidences.content: On 5 December 2015, Lyon played their final game in the Stade de Gerland in a 2–0 defeat against Angers. The stadium is now the home of Lyon OU Rugby and currently holds a capacity of 35,000 spectators. Parc Olympique Lyonnais (2016–present) [...] In the 2019–20 season, Lyon suffered a poor start to the season, and ended the season in seventh place, as the league was cancelled due to the coronavirus outbreak. Lyon also reached the final of the Coupe de la Ligue, however, they eventually lost to Paris Saint-Germain 6–5 on penalties. Ultimately, this meant that Lyon failed to qualify for European competition for the first time in 24 years. In the Champions League, Lyon were more successful, defeating Juventus in the round of 16 and Manchester City in the quarter-final to reach the semi-finals for the first time in 10 years. However, they eventually lost 3–0 in the semi-final to Bayern Munich, eliminating Lyon from the competition. Two seasons later, Lyon competed in the 2021–22 Europa League season, eventually being knocked out of [...] | 1950–51") 1951–52") 1952–53") 1953–54") 1954–55") 1955–56") 1956–57") 1957–58") 1958–59") 1959–60") 1960–61") 1961–62") 1962–63") 1963–64") 1964...

evidences.title: Luis Enrique: ‘We are approaching this match with a lot of ambition’
evidences.content: ### KANG IN-LEE “In a high performing team, there are a lot of players who are important. Gonçalo made his 100th appearance recently, Kang-In can do the same at Lyon. It’s an impressive stat, it also shows how important he is. He knows that he can improve, but we are very happy to work with him, and I am very pleased to see him reach this landmark. “ ### WARREN ZAÏRE-EMERY “He has been very important for the team and for me. He is a very different player, because he shows his quality all of the time, no matter how confident he is. He is very mature, he is always ready, it’s really great to work with him. He is a leader, he shows how a player should behave even when he is lacking confident. He has been and continues to be a role model.” ### SENNY MAYULU [...] ### THE CONDITION OF THE SQUAD “I am very motivated because I like challenges! It’s an interesting period because we need to find solutions, but I am positive. We need to accept that these things happen in our sport and it’s part of daily life of football at the highest level.” ### CONFIDENCE OF THE SQUAD “I like to see the reaction from my players following a defeat. When you get into the dressing room after a loss, you can...

evidences.title: The Effects of Schedule Congestion | 105 analytics - Football by the numbers
evidences.content: There's a lot to unwrap in this first chart. The red line shows the distance travelled based on the number of days of rest. We can see that after 6 days of rest, teams traveled an average of about 2200 km for their match. This is the highest travel burden shown in the chart. Seven days of rest has the second highest average travel distance. Those two numbers have been called out repeatedly my comments above. What the chart is showing is that while teams are getting a lot of rest leading up to those matches, they're traveling long distances and (in this case) it appears that their offensive output is at its worst. [...] | Home | Away | --- | | Distance traveled | 1400 km | 2552 km | | xG | 1.45 | 1.12 | | Goals scored per match | 1.07 | 0.67 | | xGA | 1.55 | 1.45 | | Goals conceded per match | 1.40 | 1.24 | | Points achieved | 0.93 | 0.86 | Generally, those are worse numbers on the road. Interestingly the teams did perform marginally better defensively in the away games. Now I'm wondering if this is a problem regardless of the number of days of rest before a match. Tweak the code a bit and here's what comes up: | Home | Away | --- | | Distance traveled | 1251 km | 2116 km | | xG...

evidences.title: Lyon hit by more injuries | Football News | Sky Sports
evidences.content: #### National Leagues # Lyon hit by more injuries By Patrick Haond Lyon duo Hatem Ben Arfa and Eric Abidal face a spell on the sidelines. Both players sustained the injuries during Lyon's defeat to Lille in the French League Cup. Abidal picked up a knee knock in the game and he has been forced to withdraw from the France squad for the game with Poland next week. Ben Arfa's injury is a bigger concern for Lyon as he broke his collarbone and he faces several months on the sidelines. Ben Arfa sustained the injury after being felled in the penalty area, but no penalty was awarded to Lyon much to the disdain of chairman Jean-Michel Aulas. "At the end of the match I asked the referee to come and see Hatem Ben Arfa. He refused and it is a shame," fumed Aulas. [...] "Because he didn't blow for an obvious penalty, and he could at least realise the consequences of that forgotten foul. "I am not sad with the elimination, but when there are fouls, you have to blow for them! "I don't feel Mr Layec (referee) did everything to keep the physical integrity of the players. "We have too many injured players, it is a big worry."   Abidal picked up a knee knock in the game an...

evidences.title: Lyon included in Ligue 1 fixtures for 2025-26 despite demotion to second tier - BBC Sport
evidences.content: # Lyon included in Ligue 1 fixtures despite demotion A corner flag with the badge of Lyon pictured at the Parc Olympique Lyonnais Lyon have won the Ligue 1 title on seven occasions Lyon have been included in the Ligue 1 fixtures for next season despite being relegated to French football's second tier because of the poor state of their finances. In the schedule released on Friday, Lyon have been earmarked to play Lens in their opening game of the 2025-26 campaign - which starts on the weekend of 16-17 August. Lyon were provisionally demoted in November by the DNGC, the body which oversees the accounts of French professional football clubs. evidences.content: Image 1: Logo Respecting your privacy is our priority We and our 31 partners) use cookies or similar technologies to provide you with personalized and geolocated advertisements and content, as well as to measure the audience and performance of the website's content and advertisements. The processed data comes from your browsing on this site, your profile, or even cookie identifiers. Some cookies essential for the functioning of the site are also deposited without your consent. A more detailed description is available in the section "Customize my choices". We keep your choice for 6 months. You can change your mind at any time by clicking on the link "Manage my personal data" at the bottom of each page of our sites. Please refer to our personal data privacy policy.
